news.title: Has Novartis’ T-Charge been overtaken by in vivo CAR-Ts? Execs argue there’s room for both
news.snippet: It’s been more than four years since Novartis shook up the CAR-T space with its T-Charge platform. But that’s a lifetime in the fast-moving world of cell therapies.

news.title: OSE turns up the heat on ovarian cancer with phase 2, Keytruda-supported win

news.title: Biogen axes Denali-partnered Parkinson’s prospect after phase 2 flop
news.snippet: A phase 2b trial of Biogen and Denali Therapeutics’ Parkinson’s disease candidate has missed its primary endpoint, prompting the partners to end development in the idiopathic form of the condition.<br

news.title: Betting on biotech: Prediction markets set sights on clinical trials
news.snippet: Several biotech contracts are rotating through Kalshi and Polymarket, while a prediction market specifically focused on clinical trials has recently launched.

news.title: Lilly’s triple-G drug helps patients lose roughly a quarter of weight, showcasing competitive profile

news.title: Struggling Liminatus pays $320M in stock for CAR-T biotech InnocsAI
news.snippet: Cancer immunotherapy company Liminatus Pharma has agreed to pay out shares worth $320 million to buy CAR-T biotech InnocsAI.

news.title: Infex, following in Insmed’s footsteps, advances lung disease candidate after clearing phase 2a

news.title: GHO Capital, CBC Group plan to merge, forming $21B healthcare investment firm

news.title: Qiagen links with chip giant Nvidia to propel AI use in drug discovery
news.snippet: Qiagen, a Netherlands-based diagnostics maker, is linking with tech giant Nvidia in a collaboration aimed at boosting the ability of researchers to leverage AI in the drug discovery process.

news.snippet: San Carlos-based Engage is developing non-viral DNA delivery systems that aim to overcome traditional limitations associated with the modality.

news.title: Designing an agentic, future‑ready tech roadmap for emerging pharma
news.snippet: JR Raelin of SynOx Therapeutics and Krishna GS of ZS discuss how emerging pharma teams can design scalable, compliant tech roadmaps as agentic AI expectations rise.

news.title: AbbVie plots 85 summer layoffs tied to Allergan unit in California
news.snippet: The layoffs at AbbVie's Irvine, California, location will take effect on July 20, according to a recent WARN notice.

news.title: AstraZeneca, Daiichi beat Gilead to first-line TNBC with FDA nod for Datroway
news.snippet: A three-way battle among TROP2 ADCs in first-line triple-negative breast cancer is forming as AstraZeneca and Daiichi Sankyo's Datroway became the first to cross the FDA's finish line.

news.title: Novartis, AbbVie plan summer layoffs on opposite coasts
news.snippet: AbbVie's 85 layoffs are tied to its Allergan Aesthetics headquarters in California, while Novartis is cutting more staff at its U.S. HQ in New Jersey.

news.title: AbbVie, GSK race up patient reputation leaderboard in the UK
news.snippet: AbbVie and GSK have surged up the rankings of the pharma companies with the best reputations among U.K. patient groups, contributing to turnover at the top of the leaderboards.

news.title: Tyra creates awareness day with patient advocates to shine light on a rare cancer
news.snippet: Tyra Biosciences has partnered with a patient advocacy group to create an awareness day for upper tract urothelial cancer, a rare tumor type its lead drug candidate targets.

news.snippet: Healthcare agencies remain at the forefront of pharmaceutical marketing, but new technologies and shifting political dynamics are putting increasing pressure on the industry.

news.title: Gilead pledges 400K AmBisome doses to fight visceral leishmaniasis in expanded WHO collab
news.snippet: Gilead’s five-year contract with the WHO is centered on providing AmBisome to countries that make up 74% of the global visceral leishmaniasis burden, according to the company.

news.title: With Voxzogo under pressure, BioMarin touts trial win in label expansion bid
news.snippet: With phase 3 results that have “exceeded” BioMarin’s expectations, the California biotech looks set up to gain a label expansion for its top-selling product, dwarfism drug Voxzogo.

news.title: Opinion: The seed oil panic is hurting my cardiac patients
news.snippet: “My patients are replacing olive oil with beef tallow, even if they don't tell me during cardiac rehab,” writes a clinical dietitian.
